body.name: statement
body.value: select shaiHospitalId,hospitalName,hospitalAddr1,hospitalCityId,hospitalPincode,hospitalContact,hospitalIsActive,hospitalIsPpn,hospitalState,hospitalRegistrationCode,rohiniCode,cpuCode as zone,isNetworkHospital,empanelmentEndDate,isBlacklisted,isCaution,specialityType,bedCount,hospitalPanNumber,SUSPICIOUS_FLAG as hospitalFlag_falg,SUSPICIOUS_DATE as hospitalFlag_date,SUSPICIOUS_REASON as hospitalFlag_reason,PRATHAM_FLAG as prathamFlag,HOSPITAL_GRADE as hospitalGrade,SOC_FLAG as socFlag,NETWORK_HOSP_TYPE as networkHospType,hospitalAddr1 as landmark from uat.matrix_int.ma_hospitals where Reported_Date >= '2025-10-01' ORDER BY shaiHospitalId LIMIT ${BATCH_SIZE} OFFSET ${OFFSET}

body.name: statement
body.value: SELECT * FROM uat.salesforce_int.sf_sales_manager where change_date >= '2025-10-01' ORDER BY FULLFILLER_CODE LIMIT ${BATCH_SIZE} OFFSET ${OFFSET}

body.name: statement
body.value: select SEQ_NUM,INTERMEDIATOR_EMAIL_E,NUMBER_OF_YEAR,PROPOSER_EMAIL_ID_E,POLICY_FROM_DATE,GRACE_PERIOD_END_DATE,PREMIA_CONVERTED_POLICY_TOTAL_PREMIUM,SALES_MANAGER_PHONE_E,INSTALLMENT_PREMIUM_AMOUNT,OFFICE_CODE,PRODUCT_CODE,BRANCH_MANAGER_NAME,PAYMENT_DATE,INSTALLMENT_TAX,SOURCE,PROPOSAL_TYPE,PREVIOUS_POLICY_NUMBER,CURRENCY_POLICY_PREMIUM_GST,RENEWAL_PAYMENT_TYPE,INTERMEDIARY_CODE,FULFILLER_CODE,CURRENT_PREMIUM_TAX,PIN_CODE,POLICY_CONVERTED_DATE,PREMIA_CURRENT_POLICY_SUM_INSURED,RENEWAL_STATUS,INSTALLMENT_TOTAL_PREMIUM,NCB,INTERMEDIARY_NAME,BRANCH_MANAGER_PH_NO,ENVIRONMENT,BRANCH_MANAGER_CODE,INTERMEDIATOR_PHONE_E,SECONDARY_EMAIL,EMI_POLICY,DIVISON_CODE,RECORD_RECEIVED_FROM_SYSTEM,PROPOSER_CONTACT_NO_E,RENEWAL_LOCATION,WORKFLOW_TRIGGER,PAYMENT_STATUS,RENEWAL_ID,POLICY_TO_DATE,RENEWAL_POLICY_REF_NO,POLICY_RENEWED,PREMIA_CURRENT_POLICY_NO,PAYMENT_MODE,INSTALLMENT_YEAR,SUM_INSURED,CURRENT_POLICY_PREMIUM_TOTAL_AMOUNT,PREMIA_CONVERTED_PREMIUM_AMOUNT,CONTACT_NAME,PREMIA_CONVERTED_POLICY_NO,PREMIUM_AMOUNT,CLAIM_STATUS,PREMIA_CONTACT_CODE,CURRENT_POLICY_PREMIUM_AMOUNT,CURRENT_POLICY_NUMBER,PRODUCT_NAME,CURRENT_PREMIUM_TOTAL,PREMIA_CONVERTED_POLICY_GST,RENEWAL_ADDRESS3,RENEWAL_ADDRESS1,NCD_ISSUED,SALES_MANAGER_NAME,NO_OF_INSTALLMENT,RENEWAL_ADDRESS2,UPSELL_SUM_INSURED_1,UPSELL_PREMIUM_1,UPSELL_GST_1,UPSELL_TOTAL_1,UPSELL_SUM_INSURED_2,UPSELL_PREMIUM_2,UPSELL_GST_2,UPSELL_TOTAL_2,UPSELL_SUM_INSURED_3,UPSELL_PREMIUM_3,UPSELL_GST_3,UPSELL_TOTAL_3,UPSELL_SUM_INSURED_4,UPSELL_PREMIUM_4,UPSELL_GST_4,UPSELL_TOTAL_4,UPSELL_SUM_INSURED_5,UPSELL_PREMIUM_5,UPSELL_GST_5,UPSELL_TOTAL_5,REPORTED_DATE,LOAD_TIMESTAMP FROM uat.reporting_tables.agg_renewal_quote_push_crm where SEQ_NUM >= ${CURSOR} order by SEQ_NUM asc limit ${BATCH_SIZE};

body.name: statement
body.value: SELECT * FROM uat.salesforce_int.sf_customer360_bulk WHERE change_date >= '2025-11-05' ORDER BY DL_UNIQUE_ID LIMIT ${BATCH_SIZE} OFFSET ${OFFSET}

body.name: statement
body.value: SELECT * FROM UAT.salesforce_int.sf_policy360_bulk where change_date >= '2025-11-05' ORDER BY POLICY_NUMBER LIMIT ${BATCH_SIZE} OFFSET ${OFFSET}

body.name: statement
body.value: SELECT * FROM UAT.salesforce_int.sf_policy360_member_bulk where change_date >= '2025-11-05' ORDER BY POLICY_NUMBER, DL_UNIQUE_ID LIMIT ${BATCH_SIZE} OFFSET ${OFFSET}

body.name: statement
body.value: SELECT * FROM uat.salesforce_int.sf_office_master WHERE change_date >= '2025-10-01' ORDER BY OFFICE_CODE LIMIT ${BATCH_SIZE} OFFSET ${OFFSET}

body.name: statement
body.value: SELECT * FROM uat.salesforce_int.sf_agent_master where change_date >= '2025-11-05' ORDER BY AGENT_CODE LIMIT ${BATCH_SIZE} OFFSET ${OFFSET}

request.baseQuery: SELECT id, lead_uuid, mobile_number_e, credit_card_count, total_credit_accounts, total_credit_card_limits, total_late_payment_days, full_name, gender, age, latest_pincode, score_v3, affluence, state, languages FROM customer_lead

body.name: statement
body.value: SELECT * FROM uat.salesforce_int.sf_emi_feed WHERE LIMIT ${BATCH_SIZE} OFFSET ${OFFSET}

body.name: statement
body.value: SELECT * FROM UAT.salesforce_int.sf_proposal_update where change_date >= '2025-10-05' ORDER BY PROPOSAL_NUMBER LIMIT ${BATCH_SIZE} OFFSET ${OFFSET}

request.baseQuery: SELECT id, lead_uuid, mobile_number_e, credit_card_count, total_credit_accounts, total_credit_card_limits, total_late_payment_days, full_name, gender, age, latest_pincode, score_v3, affluence, state, languages FROM customer_lead

body.name: statement
body.value: select SEQ_NUM,* FROM uat.reporting_tables.agg_renewal_quote_push_crm where SEQ_NUM > ${CURSOR} AND gc_flag = 'Y' AND proposal_status not in ('CANCELLED', 'REJECTED') AND REPORTED_DATE >= CURRENT_DATE()-2 order by SEQ_NUM asc limit ${BATCH_SIZE};

body.name: statement
body.value: select SEQ_NUM,* FROM uat.reporting_tables.agg_renewal_quote_push_crm where SEQ_NUM > ${CURSOR} AND proposal_status in ('CANCELLED', 'REJECTED') order by SEQ_NUM asc limit ${BATCH_SIZE};

body.name: statement
body.value: select * FROM uat.reporting_tables.agg_renewal_quote_push_crm where SEQ_NUM > ${CURSOR} AND PREMIA_CONVERTED_POLICY_NO is not null order by SEQ_NUM asc limit ${BATCH_SIZE};

report.jobName: Migrate Renewal Quotes Converted to Policy
